content_text: As the back-to-school season kicks off, our mornings become a whirlwind of schedules, traffic, and competing priorities. This shift can easily pull your focus away from safety, especially when driving. The Stay Focused, Stay Safe campaign this August is all about building one simple habit to protect yourself and others. Pick a habit—like keeping a safe following distance or pausing for a quick Rate Your State (RYS) check before you start your engine—and practice it every time you get in your vehicle. Tracking your progress through YOUFactors will help turn that habit into second nature, keeping you safe amid the busy days ahead.
image_prompt: An infographic titled 'Stay Focused, Stay Safe' with a clean modern corporate design. The background is a solid light gray. The infographic features a central icon of a car with a safe following distance marked, surrounded by bold saturated colors. There are four main sections: 'Pick a Habit', 'Rate Your State', 'Track Progress', and 'YOUFactors'. Each section has a bold icon and a short label. The typography is clean, bold, and sans-serif with high contrast. The overall tone is professional and educational.
summary: The infographic visualizes the key message of the Back to School Awareness Campaign, focusing on building safe driving habits and tracking progress through YOUFactors.
alt_text: An infographic titled 'Stay Focused, Stay Safe' with sections on picking a habit, rate your state, tracking progress, and using YOUFactors.
